items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Reported Seizure of Ships Injects New Uncertainty Over Peace Talks
items.summary: Iran’s Revolutionary Guards said they had seized two ships near the Strait of Hormuz. A Trump spokeswoman said the president did not view those actions as violating the cease-fire.

items.title: Israeli forces fire tear gas at funeral of Palestinians killed by settlers
items.summary: Israeli forces raided the funeral of two Palestinians killed by settlers at a school in the occupied West Bank.
